name: Tempting Trifle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the soft coconut macaroons and press the crumbs onto the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., 15 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in sour cream, whipping cream, sherry, and vanilla; stir until combined.
6. Pour over the crust.
7. Bake at 325 degrees F., 1 hour and 10 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim.
9. Chill completely.
10. Heat the raspberry preserves in a saucepan over low heat until melted. Strain to remove seeds.
11. Spoon over the cheesecake, spreading to the edges.
12. Dollop with whipped cream and top with toasted slivered almonds.
